param.name: pilot
param.comment: Pilot (optional, will be retrieved from ship if not provided)

do_if.value: not $ship? or not $ship.exists or @$ship.iswreck or not @$ship.isoperational

debug_text.text: '[GT-Mods] Install entry ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', pilot=' + $pilotNameDbg + ', default=' + $defaultOrderId + ', current=' + $currentOrderId + ', commanderOrder=' + $commanderOrderId
'[GT-Mods] Deferred install waiting for pilot binding on ' + $ship.idcode + ' (pilot=' + $pilotNameDbg + ')'

do_if.value: $pilot? and md.GT_Ship_Management.Register_Pilot? and (not global.$GT_Pilots? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level?)
$pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level? and GT_Reconcile_Ship_Modifications?

debug_text.text: '[GT-Mods] Install exit ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', pilot=' + $pilotNameDbg + ', reconciled=' + $reconciled
'[GT-Mods] Deferred install waiting for pilot registry on ' + $ship.idcode + ' (pilot=' + $pilotNameDbg + ')'

param.name: ship
param.comment: Ship to remove penalty modifications from

debug_text.text: '[GT-Penalty] Removing penalty mods from ' + $ship.idcode + ' (ship: ' + (if $shipModName? then $shipModName else 'none') + ', engine: ' + (if $engineModName? then $engineModName else 'none') + ', explicit removal call)'
'[GT-Penalty] Skipping penalty mod removal for ' + $ship.idcode + ' - not GT-installed (player mod may be present)'
'[GT-Penalty] No penalty mod found on ' + $ship.idcode + ' to remove (explicit removal call)'

do_if.value: $wareId? and ($wareId == 'mod_ship_gt_level1' or $wareId == 'mod_ship_gt_level2' or $wareId == 'mod_ship_gt_level3' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_ship_light' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_ship_moderate' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_ship_severe' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_light' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_moderate' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_severe')

$wareId? and ($wareId == 'mod_engine_gt_level1' or $wareId == 'mod_engine_gt_level2' or $wareId == 'mod_engine_gt_level3' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_engine_light' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_engine_moderate' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_engine_severe' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_light' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_moderate' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_severe')
not global.$GT_Ships? or not global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}? or not global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$GTModifications?
not $ship? or not $ship.exists or @$ship.iswreck or not @$ship.isoperational

param.name: modificationsEnabledOverride
param.comment: Optional override for global toggle (e.g. from settings-changed signal)

param.name: removeGTModsOnly
param.comment: Force GT-managed mod removal without relying on settings override semantics

debug_text.text: '[GT-Mods] Reconcile entry ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', pilot=' + (if $pilot and $pilot.exists and $pilot.name? then $pilot.name else 'NONE') + ', override=' + (if $modificationsEnabledOverride != null then $modificationsEnabledOverride else 'NULL') + ', removeOnly=' + $removeGTModsOnly + ', globalEnabled=' + $globalModificationsEnabled + ', effectiveEnabled=' + $modificationsEnabled + ', source=' + $modificationsEnabledSource + ', default=' + $defaultOrderId + ', current=' + $currentOrderId + ', commander=' + $commanderId + ', commanderOrder=' + $commanderOrderId + ', trackedSlots=' + $trackedSlotsCount

do_if.value: $modificationsEnabled and $pilot? and md.GT_Ship_Management.Register_Pilot? and (not global.$GT_Pilots? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level?)
$pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level?
$modificationsEnabled and (not $pilot? or not global.$GT_Pilots? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level?)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Mods] Reconcile deferred for ' + $ship.idcode + ' - GT pilot registry not ready (pilot=' + (if $pilot and $pilot.exists and $pilot.name? then $pilot.name else 'NONE') + ', source=' + $modificationsEnabledSource + ', effectiveEnabled=' + $modificationsEnabled + ')'
'[GT-Mods] Reconcile-disable ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', source=' + $modificationsEnabledSource + ', removeOnly=' + $removeGTModsOnly + ', effectiveEnabled=' + $modificationsEnabled

'[GT-Mods] Reconcile apply ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', pilotLevel=' + $pilotLevel + ', class=' + $shipClass + ', desiredPenalty=' + $desiredPenaltyLevel + ', desiredBonus=' + $desiredBonusLevel + ', desiredShipId=' + $desiredShipParam + ', desiredEngineId=' + $desiredEngineParam

'[GT-Mods] Reconcile ' + $ship.idcode + ': enabled=' + $modificationsEnabled + ', pilot=' + $pilotLevel + ', class=' + $shipClass + ', desiredPenalty=' + $desiredPenaltyLevel + ', desiredBonus=' + $desiredBonusLevel + ', finalShip=' + @global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$GTModifications.$GTInstalledSlots.count

param.name: modificationsEnabledOverride
param.comment: Optional override for global $Modifications.$Enabled (e.g. from settings-changed signal)

param.name: ship
param.comment: Player-owned ship to validate after load

do_if.value: not $ship? or not $ship.exists or not $ship.isplayerowned or @$ship.iswreck or not @$ship.isoperational

debug_text.text: '[GT-Mods] Load cleanup scan: ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', default=' + (if $ship.defaultorder? then @$ship.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ', current=' + (if $ship.order? then @$ship.order.id else 'NONE') + ', identifiedGTMods=' + $identifiedGTMods + ', trackedNeedsCleanup=' + $trackedNeedsCleanup + ', shouldCleanup=' + $gtStatus.$ShouldCleanup
'[GT-Mods] Cleared legacy penalty registry keys on ' + $migrationCount + ' ships'
'[GT-Mods] Mod removal Lua module is provided via ui.xml'

param.name: enabled
param.comment: true=add researchables, false=remove; null reads global setting

debug_text.text: '[GT-ResearchSync] ENTER source=' + $source + ' paramEnabled=' + (if $enabled != null then $enabled else 'null') + ' settings=' + $settingsExists + ' modsTable=' + $modsTableExists + ' enabledKey=' + $enabledKeyExists + ' settingsEnabled=' + (if $enabledFromSettings != null then $enabledFromSettings else 'null') + ' knownBefore=' + $knownMk1Before + '/' + $knownMk2Before + '/' + $knownMk3Before
'[GT-ResearchSync] shouldShow from param=' + $shouldShow + ' source=' + $source
'[GT-ResearchSync] shouldShow from settings=' + $shouldShow + ' source=' + $source
'[GT-ResearchSync] shouldShow=SKIP (settings not readable) source=' + $source
'[GT-ResearchSync] ACTION=ADD source=' + $source
'[GT-ResearchSync] ACTION=REMOVE source=' + $source
'[GT-ResearchSync] ACTION=NONE source=' + $source
'[GT-ResearchSync] EXIT source=' + $source + ' shouldShow=' + (if $shouldShow != null then $shouldShow else 'SKIP') + ' knownAfter=' + $knownMk1After + '/' + $knownMk2After + '/' + $knownMk3After
'[GT-ResearchSync] RegisterV2 FIRED (md.Setup.Start) age=' + player.age

'[GT-ResearchSync] event_game_loaded seen age=' + player.age + ' settingsEnabled=' + (if global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Modifications? and (global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Modifications.$Enabled? or global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Modifications.$Enabled == false) then global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Modifications.$Enabled else 'UNAVAILABLE') + ' known=' + @player.encyclopedia.researchables.{'research_gt_consortium_mod_mk1'}.exists + '/' + @player.encyclopedia.researchables.{'research_gt_consortium_mod_mk2'}.exists + '/' + @player.encyclopedia.researchables.{'research_gt_consortium_mod_mk3'}.exists

'[GT-ResearchSync] +2s verify age=' + player.age + ' settingsEnabled=' + (if global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Modifications? and (global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Modifications.$Enabled? or global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Modifications.$Enabled == false) then global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Modifications.$Enabled else 'UNAVAILABLE') + ' known=' + @player.encyclopedia.researchables.{'research_gt_consortium_mod_mk1'}.exists + '/' + @player.encyclopedia.researchables.{'research_gt_consortium_mod_mk2'}.exists + '/' + @player.encyclopedia.researchables.{'research_gt_consortium_mod_mk3'}.exists

'[GT-ResearchSync] +5s verify age=' + player.age + ' known=' + @player.encyclopedia.researchables.{'research_gt_consortium_mod_mk1'}.exists + '/' + @player.encyclopedia.researchables.{'research_gt_consortium_mod_mk2'}.exists + '/' + @player.encyclopedia.researchables.{'research_gt_consortium_mod_mk3'}.exists
'[GT-Mods] GT mod research unlocked (' + event.param + ') - refreshing fleet modifications'

text.comment: tier: Fleet Standard / Special Spec / Lost Tech

do_if.value: $shipIdCode? and $shipIdCode != '' and $shipIdCode != 'UNKNOWN' and global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.keys.count gt 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-Mods] Lua probe stored ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' shipWare=' + $probeShipWare + ' engineWare=' + $probeEngineWare + ' shipNonGT=' + $probeShipNonGT + ' engineNonGT=' + $probeEngineNonGT
'[GT-Mods] Lua probe signal had no blackboard entry for ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' - re-probing'
'[GT-Mods] Lua probe signal ignored - could not resolve ship for idcode=' + (if $shipIdCode? then $shipIdCode else 'NONE')
'[GT-Mods] Load cleanup completed: scanned=' + (if $playerShips.count? then $playerShips.count else 0) + ', cleaned=' + $cleanedCount

do_if.value: $enabledOverride == null and global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Modifications? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Modifications.$Enabled != null

debug_text.text: '[GT-ResearchSync] SettingsChanged override=' + (if $enabledOverride == null then 'null' else $enabledOverride)
'[GT-Mods] Deferred refresh skipped: missing ship in payload (source=' + $source + ', attempt=' + $attempt + ')'

'[GT-Mods] Deferred refresh entry ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', source=' + $source + ', attempt=' + $attempt + ', pilot=' + $pilotNameDbg + ', default=' + $defaultOrderId + ', current=' + $currentOrderId + ', commanderOrder=' + $commanderOrderId
'[GT-Mods] Deferred refresh processed for ' + $ship.idcode + ' source=' + $source + ' attempt=' + $attempt + ' complete=' + $refreshComplete

check_value.value: global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and event.param? and event.param.id? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@event.param.id}

debug_text.text: '[GT-Mods] GT order assigned - installing modifications for ship: ' + $ship.idcode
'[GT-Mods] Commander set to GT commander - installing subordinate modifications for: ' + $ship.idcode
'[GT-Mods] Installing modifications for ship: ' + $ship.idcode + ' (from state update - GT order assigned)'
'[GT-Mods] Installing modifications for subordinate: ' + $ship.idcode + ' (commander has GT order)'
'[GT-Mods] Remove cue entry ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', updateType=' + (if $updateType then $updateType else 'NULL') + ', shouldProcess=' + $shouldProcess
'[GT-Mods] Remove cue executing disable reconcile for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (direct=' + $hasDirectGTOrder + ', viaCommander=' + $hasGTCommander + ', updateType=' + $updateType + ')'
'[GT-Mods] Clearing home refresh marker (home=' + @$hs.knownname + ', initiator=' + $ship.idcode + ' lost GT order)'
'[GT-Mods] SAFEGUARD: Skipping mod removal for ' + $ship.idcode + ' - ship still GT-controlled (direct=' + $hasDirectGTOrder + ', viaCommander=' + $hasGTCommander + ')'
'[GT-Mods] SAFEGUARD: Skipping backup removal for ' + $ship.idcode + ' - ship still GT-controlled (direct=' + $hasDirectGTOrder + ', viaCommander=' + $hasGTCommander + ', reason=' + $reason + ')'

'[GT-Mods] Backup removal executing disable reconcile for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (reason=' + (if $reason? and $reason != '' then $reason else 'UNSPECIFIED') + ', direct=' + $hasDirectGTOrder + ', viaCommander=' + $hasGTCommander + ')'
